translations.es: Aquí no se acostumbra dejar propina.
translations.fr: Ici, on ne laisse pas de pourboire.
translations.it: Qui non si usa lasciare la mancia.
translations.ko: 여기서는 팁을 주는 게 일반적이지 않아요.
translations.pt: Aqui não é costume dar gorjeta.
translations.vi: Ở đây không có thói quen để lại tiền tip.
translations.nl: Hier is het niet gebruikelijk om fooi te geven.
translations.hi: यहाँ टिप देना आम नहीं है।
translations.el: Εδώ δεν συνηθίζεται να δίνεις φιλοδώρημα.
translations.nb: Her er det ikke vanlig å gi tips.
translations.id: Di sini tidak biasa memberi tip.
translations.sv: Här brukar man inte ge dricks.
translations.ro: Aici nu se obișnuiește să lași bacșiș.
translations.da: Her plejer man ikke at give drikkepenge.
translations.ja: ここではチップを渡す習慣はありません。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb setting the place; occupies the clause-initial topical position.
Copula (3sg.pres.) in verb-second position, linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Subject noun (neuter, nominative singular) meaning gratuity.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate, negating the statement.
Predicative adjective serving as the complement of the copula.

translations.en: Paying in cash is common here.
translations.es: Aquí se suele pagar en efectivo.
translations.fr: Ici, on paie souvent en espèces.
translations.it: Da noi si paga spesso in contanti.
translations.yue: 呢度一般都用現金畀錢。
translations.pt: Aqui é comum pagar em dinheiro.
translations.vi: Ở đây thường trả bằng tiền mặt.
translations.nl: Bij ons is contant betalen gebruikelijk.
translations.hi: यहाँ नकद में भुगतान करना आम है।
translations.pl: U nas zwykle płaci się gotówką.
translations.el: Εδώ συνηθίζεται να πληρώνεις με μετρητά.
translations.nb: Hos oss er det vanlig å betale kontant.
translations.sv: Hos oss är det vanligt att betala kontant.
translations.ro: La noi se plătește de obicei cu numerar.
translations.cs: U nás je běžné platit v hotovosti.
translations.da: Hos os er det almindeligt at betale kontant.
translations.ja: ここでは現金で払うのが普通です。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating context/location.
Personal pronoun (1st pl., dative); object of the preposition 'bei'.
Copula (3sg.pres.) in verb-second position, linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Subject noun (feminine, nominative singular) meaning payment in cash.
Predicative adjective serving as the complement of the copula.

translations.es: En Alemania es habitual ser puntual.
translations.fr: En Allemagne, la ponctualité est la norme.
translations.it: In Germania la puntualità è la norma.
translations.ko: 독일에서는 시간을 잘 지키는 게 일반적이에요.
translations.pt: Na Alemanha, é comum ser pontual.
translations.vi: Ở Đức, đúng giờ là điều bình thường.
translations.ar: في ألمانيا، الالتزام بالمواعيد هو المعتاد.
translations.nl: In Duitsland is op tijd komen de norm.
translations.hi: जर्मनी में समय पर पहुँचना सामान्य माना जाता है।
translations.el: Στη Γερμανία η τήρηση της ώρας είναι ο κανόνας.
translations.nb: I Tyskland er det vanlig å komme presis.
translations.id: Di Jerman, datang tepat waktu adalah hal biasa.
translations.sv: I Tyskland är det vanligt att komma i tid.
translations.ro: În Germania, este obișnuit să fii punctual.
translations.cs: V Německu je běžné chodit včas.
translations.da: I Tyskland er det normalt at komme til tiden.
translations.ja: ドイツでは時間を守るのが普通です。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; with static location it governs dative; introduces a location PP.
Proper noun (country name), object of the preposition 'in' (dative).
Copula (3sg.pres.) in verb-second position, linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Subject noun (feminine, nominative singular) denoting the quality of being punctual.
Predicative adjective serving as the complement of the copula.

translations.en: Sleeping in is common on Sundays.
translations.es: Los domingos es común dormir hasta tarde.
translations.fr: Le dimanche, on fait souvent la grasse matinée.
translations.it: La domenica è normale dormire fino a tardi.
translations.pt: Nos domingos é comum dormir até mais tarde.
translations.he: ביום ראשון נהוג לישון עד מאוחר.
translations.vi: Vào Chủ nhật, mọi người thường ngủ nướng.
translations.ar: في يوم الأحد من المعتاد النوم حتى وقت متأخر.
translations.hi: रविवार को देर तक सोना आम है।
translations.pl: W niedzielę zwykle śpi się dłużej.
translations.el: Την Κυριακή συνηθίζεται να κοιμάσαι μέχρι αργά.
translations.nb: På søndager er det vanlig å sove lenge.
translations.id: Pada hari Minggu, orang biasanya bangun siang.
translations.sv: På söndagar brukar man sova länge.
translations.ro: Duminica se doarme de obicei până târziu.
translations.cs: V neděli se obvykle spí déle.
translations.da: Om søndagen er det almindeligt at sove længe.
translations.ja: 日曜日はゆっくり寝るのが普通です。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition ('an' + 'dem'); governs dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Proper noun (day of the week), object of the preposition 'am' (dative).
Copula (3sg.pres.) in verb-second position, linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Nominalized infinitive (from the separable verb 'ausschlafen'); serves as the subject (nominative singular).
Predicative adjective serving as the complement of the copula.
